description: On unexpected internal failure, the registry MUST return the standard error envelope (RFC-ACDP-0007 §4) with HTTP 500 and code 'internal_error'. The response Content-Type MUST be application/acdp+json. error.message MUST NOT leak stack traces or sensitive context.

input.scenario: Registry triggers an unhandled exception path (e.g., persistence layer throws). Implementation-defined trigger — fixtures cannot reproduce; this is a structural test for the response shape.
